Zi. 3-5/2006-14 #7191 et) bum .1(115c1I1t MINISTRY OF WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th September, 2007 S.O. 1497(E).—In pursuance of Section 3(2)(b) of the Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005 (4 of 2006), the Central Government hereby nominates Ms. Nighat Shafi, 16-A, Gogji Bagh, Srinagar-190001 as a Member of the National Commission for Protection of Child Rights in the field of child psychology or sociology. Ms. Nighat qi shall hold office for a period of three years from 6th September, 2007, or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 3-5/2006-CW] MANJULA KRISHNAN, Economic Adviser 3701 G1/2007 Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-l10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, -- 1 of 1 --
